puzzle.title: The Perished Witnesses
puzzle.intro: In an age long past, a community dwelled in a land crossroads between empires. Their prophet called them toward the path of truth, yet they clung to disbelief and oppression. This story ends in divine retribution. Can you identify this nation and their fate from the clues below?
clues: A people rejected the warning brought by one of their own messengers.
The messenger called us to worship Allah alone and warned against corruption.
Our transgression was rejecting the prophet sent among us with righteousness.
We doubted the messenger's authority and accused him of deception.
The punishment overtook us while we were dwelling securely in our homes.
We were destroyed for denying our prophet and persecuting the believers.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Receiving a prophet who called to righteousness
trial.answer: Receiving a prophet who called to righteousness

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The people were destroyed for disbelief
The people repented and were guided
The people migrated to a new land
outcome.answer: The people were destroyed for disbelief

puzzle.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًۭا فَقَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱرْجُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
puzzle.verse: And to Madyan [We sent] their brother Shuʿayb, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh and expect the Last Day and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption." (29:36)
